question_project_template_v1.purpose: Capture long-tail homeowner questions without creating thin pages.
schema: FAQPage if genuine FAQs are present
question_project_template_v1.noindex_until: has at least 4 unique source-backed blocks and 5 contextual internal links

approved_document_longtail_template_v1.purpose: Translate an Approved Document into homeowner use cases and related project pages.
approved_document_longtail_template_v1.noindex_until: source version block is visible and related projects are populated

download_landing_template_v1.purpose: Turn each printable asset into an indexable page with real preview value.
download_landing_template_v1.noindex_until: asset preview and print function exist

comparison_template_v1.purpose: Win comparison searches and reduce user confusion.
schema: FAQPage if genuine FAQs are present
comparison_template_v1.noindex_until: table, examples and source block are present

evidence_template_v1.purpose: Capture certificate/document searches and push users into project dashboard retention.
evidence_template_v1.noindex_until: document checklist and related download are rendered
